meaning: n<法俚>.女人,妻子,女同性恋者
examples: She played with the word, "metal", and the French phrase, "femme fatale".
In the 1994 movie "The Last Seduction", a femme fatale coaxes her lover into killing her husband for money.
Director George Nolfi wrote the script for The Bourne Ultimatum, and Emily Blunt was on board as the femme fatale.
Yes, Eurostar Group literally thought of everything when it comes to the ePad Femme.
Danielle Chiesi, the femme fatale in this drama, has pleaded guilty and faces sentencing later this month.
